title: Compactor Cosmos Etna Basket - Stylish Black Woven Paper and Metal Frame Organizer - Medium Size (31X24X14 cm)
features: Stylish Design :Elegant black woven paper on a sturdy metal frame, perfect for modern home decor
Rectangular Shape: Ideal for organizing books, scarves, gloves, socks, and other household items
Medium Size: 31x24x14 cm dimensions offer ample storage without taking up too much space
Natural Materials: Made with eco-friendly woven paper and durable metal framework
Ready to Use: Comes with a convenient hangtag for easy placement and organization
